title: Doorman backchannel RPC envelope
description: The one JSON envelope for manager↔agent RPC over the doorman backchannel (wss/443 + yamux + Noise, per fleet-doorman-tunnel-design). Transport-agnostic ON PURPOSE: connection auth, session resume, and warm-connection failover are the transport layer's job (Noise handshake, edge slot re-attach); the SAME envelope also rides the Matrix never-dark floor when doorman is fully blocked. Delivery may be retried after a redial, so `id` doubles as the idempotency key: receivers MUST de-duplicate requests on id, and side-effecting handlers MUST be safe to receive the same id twice. One envelope per yamux stream message; payload framing above that is the method's business.

id.description: Unique message id AND idempotency key for retried requests.

type.description: request expects a response; response/error answer a request (in_reply_to); event is fire-and-forget (e.g. a fleet-event push); heartbeat keeps the link warm (~15–20s) and carries no payload semantics.

method.description: Namespaced method for requests/events, e.g. 'task.dispatch', 'agent.status', 'voice.transcribe'. Required when type=request or type=event.

agent.description: Canonical handle of the remote agent party (the edge routes on it; identity is PROVEN by the connection's Noise keypair — a mismatch is a routing error, not an auth mechanism).

task_id.description: Tracker task this RPC acts for, when the call is work-related (LOCKED: agent actions tie to task ids). null for infrastructure calls (heartbeat, enrollment, status).

in_reply_to.description: id of the request being answered. Required (non-null) when type=response or type=error.

payload.description: Method-specific body. Free-form at the envelope level; each method documents its own payload schema.

retryable.description: true = the caller may retry the SAME id after backoff (transient); false = retrying without change is pointless.

deadline_ms.description: Caller's total-deadline hint for a request; past it the callee may abandon work and the caller reports deadline_exceeded.
